titleStmt.title: London, British Library, BL Oriental 795
Dǝrsāna Mikāʾel, Kidān za-ʾǝgziʾǝna ʾIyasus Krǝstos, Senodos, Unidentified theological work

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

history.provenance: The manuscript had very probably belonged to a church in the Gondar area, from where it was taken by Tewodros and brought to Madḫāne ʿĀlam. It was then looted by the British Napier expedition in 1868.

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

msItem.title: Dǝrsāna Mikāʾel

item.desc: Spaces left for rubrication have been left unfilled.

msItem.title: Testament of our Lord.
Of the Holy Spirit.
Of the Signs of the End of the World.
msItem.note: The rubric በእንተ፡ ትእምርት፡ ዘይከውን፡ በደኃሪ፡ መዋዕል፡ appears at the top of .

msItem.title: Of the Prodigies which shall happen.
Of the Elect in the last days.
What shall happen to the Countries.
Of the Antichrist.
Discourse of our Lord to His Disciples.
Reply of our Lord to Mary, Martha and Salome.
Of what shall be given to the Strong.
Of the Building of a Church.
Of the Ordination of a Bishop.
Prayer at the Ordination of a Bishop.
That a Bishop should be diligent in sacrifice and prayer.
That he should teach in the Church.
Of the Teaching of the fundamental Doctrines of Christianity.
Order of the Holy Eucharist.
Prayers of the Faithful, whilst and after receiving.
Prayer of the Deacon after all the people have received.
Prayer of the Bishop.
Prayer over the Oil for anointing the Sick.
Of the Praises of the Congregation.
Doctrina arcanorum
Ordination of a Priest.
Prayer at the Ordination of a Priest.
That a Priest should devote himself to the altar and prayer.
Of the Rule of the Priest.
Of those who hear and are diligent.
Of those who are saved and of those who perished.
That the Priest should visit the Sick.
Ordination of a Deacon.
Of the duties of a Deacon.
Of the number of Priests, Deacons, and Subdeacons in a church.
Of the Order of Service in church.
Of those who came late to service.
Ordination of a Deacon.
Of Widows attached to the service of the church.
Prayer for the widows.
Prayer of the widows.
Ordination of a Subdeacon.
Ordination of a Reader.
Of Virgins.
Of the Laity.
How they should be received.
How they should be admitted to Baptism.
Of the Kiss of Peace.
That women should be covered at prayer.
Of the Imposition of hands on catechumens or neophytes.
Of the Examination of catechumens or neophytes.
Exorcism to be pronounced over neophytes.
Of the Order of Baptism.
Prayer of Unction (after Baptism).
Of the Order of the Holy Eucharist.
Of Pentecost.
Of those who are invited with the bishop (to consume the holy elements).
Of Fruits which are offered.
Of the Order of a Wedding.
That the Eucharist is to be sent to a neophyte who is sick.
Of those who die in poverty.
Of the Prayers of the people.
Of the receiving of the Holy Eucharist by the Faithful.
Discourse of our Lord to His Disciples.

rubric.hi: ወይቤለነ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ወይከውን፡ ታአምር፡ ወመድምመ። በሰማይ፡ ወበምድር፡ ዘእንበለ፡ ይኩን፡ ህልቀት፡
ወእምዝ፡ ካዕበ፡ አመ፡ ቀርበ፡ ኅሡር፡ ይቤ፡ ሰይጣን፡
ወእምዝ፡ ያስተርእዮሙ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ለእለ፡ ቦቱ፡ ተወከሉ፡
ዘከሠተ፡ ሎሙ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ለአርዳኢሁ፡ መጽሐፈ፡

msItem.title: Senodos
Orders of the Apostles, 72 titloi.
Orders of the Apostles, 72 in number.
Apostolic canons (56): titloi
Canons of the Apostles, 57 in number.
Canons of Clement, which he received in a letter from S. Peter
Apostolic Canons after Ascension
Canons of the Apostles, 82 in number.
Canons of S. Simon the Canaanite 2nd recension
Apostolic canons (81)
Apostolic canons Abṭelisāt (80)
Canons of the Church Councils
Senodos: Melkite Index
Canons of the Council of Ancyra: titles
Canons of the Council of Ancyra
Canons of the Council of Neo-Caesarea: titles
Canons of the Council of Neo-Caesarea
Canons of Cyril III ibn Laqlaq
Titles of the Canons of the Council of Gangra
Canons of the Council of Gangra
Titles of the Canons of the Council of Nicaea I
Canons of the Council of Nicaea I
Titles of the Canons of the Council of Nicaea II
Nicaea, 84 canons.
Discourse of the 318 Fathers on the Trinity
Titles of the Canons of the Council of Antioch
Canons of the Council of Antioch
Titles of the Canons of the Council of Laodicea
Canons of the Council of Laodicea
Canons of the Council of Sardes
Exposition of the Ten Commandments
Discourse on the Essence of the Holy Trinity
Discourse on How to distinguish between Good and Evil
Discourse on the Fear of God
Discourse on the Ancient People, and Refutation of the Jews
Discourse of Gregory of Armenia against the Jews
Hortatory discourse to believers, who desire to walk in the path of wisdom and knowledge
ʾAbsǝliṭis qanonā baʾǝnta nǝssǝḥa tǝmhǝrt za-taśarʿa ʾǝmḫaba ʾƎgziʾabǝḥer ʾǝgziʾǝna ʾIyasus Krǝstos

item.desc: The note states that the manuscript belongs to the church of Madḫāne ʿĀlam.
item.q: መጽሐፈ፡ ኪዳን፡ ዘ ቅዱስ፡ መድኃኔ፡ ዓለም።

item.desc: The note states that the manuscript belongs to the church of Madḫāne ʿĀlam.
The names of the owner Walda Krǝstos and Gorgoryos are mentioned on .

origin.origDate: The name of ʾIyāsu II is mentioned in the prayer on .

msItem.title: Theological work
msItem.note: The work was left unfinished by the scribe.

item.desc: Spaces left for rubrication have been left unfilled.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Created XML record from Ethio authority google spreadsheet
